name: @matsumiko/runbook
description: Operational instruction kit for AI coding agents.

scripts.test: node bin/runbook.js --help && node bin/runbook.js list && node bin/runbook.js init ./tmp-runbook-smoke --agent all --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill list && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-foundation-builder ./tmp-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-figma-to-theme ./tmp-figma-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-component-builder ./tmp-component-skill-smoke --dry-run && node bin/runbook.js skill install frontend-polish-pass ./tmp-polish-skill-smoke --dry-run

author: Matsumiko
